illustrations.altText: Four-step luminous diagram showing a harmless vaccine antigen, specific antibodies, memory cells and a faster response on later exposure.
illustrations.caption: Harmless antigen → specific antibodies → memory cells → faster response.
illustrations.selectionRationale: Candidate B makes the injection, one-way 1-to-4 path and rapid later neutralisation clearest while keeping every label correct.

illustrations.altText: Four-step luminous materials diagram showing different-sized atoms, distorted metal layers, blocked layer sliding and a harder alloy.
illustrations.caption: Different-sized atoms → distorted layers → less sliding → harder alloy.
illustrations.selectionRationale: Candidate A shows the atomic obstruction and the undented hardness test most directly, without adding an extra text label.

illustrations.altText: Four-step luminous engineering diagram showing stepped-up potential difference, lower current, less cable heating and higher grid efficiency.
illustrations.caption: Potential difference up → current down → less cable heating → higher efficiency.
illustrations.selectionRationale: Candidate B has the cleanest left-to-right grid journey, transformer cutaway and reduced-heating comparison at iPad size.
